summary.intent: Fix two code review comments on PR #673 in the moltis repo: remove an unused variable and fix stale test result state.
summary.outcome: Removed unused `VALIDATION_HINT_RUNNING_TEXT` from providers.js and added `testResult` clearing on provider deletion and refresh in page-providers.js; changes were linted and committed.

repo: Provider test result state (`testResult` signal) must be explicitly cleared on deletion and reconfiguration — it is not automatically reset.
JS files live at crates/web/src/assets/js/ within the moltis monorepo.
PR reviews are fetched and addressed within git worktrees under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/.

code.finding: `VALIDATION_HINT_RUNNING_TEXT` was declared but never used after being inlined; `VALIDATION_HINT_TEXT` remains in active use.
Provider deletion success handler and provider refresh both needed explicit `testResult` signal clearing to avoid stale UI state.

workflow: PR review comments were fetched via Bash (likely `gh api`) before making fixes, establishing a clear fix list upfront.
JS files are linted before committing changes.
